zh.Georgeham, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文格奧智哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: William Croscomb是William Croscomb的兒子，於1577年1月22日在英國戴文格奧智哈姆受洗。他於1599年1月14日與Marjorie Verchill在英國戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Georgeham, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文格奧智哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Croscomb是William Croscomb的儿子，于1577年1月22日在英国戴文格奧智哈姆受洗。他于1599年1月14日与Marjorie Verchill在英国戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: William Croscomb was christened on 22 January 1577, in Georgeham, Devon, England as the son of William Croscomb. He married Marjorie Verchill on 14 January 1599, in Georgeham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: William Croscomb a été baptisé le 22 janvier 1577, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, fils de William Croscomb. Il a épousé Marjorie Verchill le 14 janvier 1599, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: William Croscomb wurde am 22. Januar 1577 in Georgeham, Devon, England, als Sohn von William Croscomb getauft. Er hat am 14. Januar 1599 in Georgeham, Devon, England Marjorie Verchill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: William Croscomb è stato battezzato il 22 gennaio 1577 nel Georgeham, Devon, England come figlio di William Croscomb. Lui sposato Marjorie Verchill il 14 gennaio 1599, nel Georgeham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.Georgeham, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンジョージェハム
ja.lifeSummary: William Croscombは1577年1月22日にイギリスデボンジョージェハムでWilliam Croscombの息子として洗礼を受けた。1599年1月14日にイギリスデボンジョージェハムでMarjorie Verchillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: William Croscomb(은)는 1577년 1월 22일 영국 데폰 조그함에서 William Croscomb의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1599년 1월 14일 영국 데폰 조그함에서 Marjorie Verchill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Croscomb foi batizado em 22 de janeiro de 1577, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra filho de William Croscomb. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Verchill em 14 de janeiro de 1599, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: William Croscomb был крещен 22 января 1577 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия. Его отца звали William Croscomb. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Verchill 14 января 1599 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: William Croscomb se bautizó el 22 de enero de 1577, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de William Croscomb. Se casó con Marjorie Verchill el 14 de enero de 1599, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
